description: Open Responses (LMStudio) Responses streaming with a function tool call. Validates v3 tool-input streaming, tool-call emission, and reasoning/text block interleaving.

source.notes: Replayed via FakeOpenAIClient against llm_dart_openai_compatible OpenAIResponses parser.

notes: This scenario ensures local function tool calls are represented as v3 tool-input parts with string deltas.
